title: MC-26 GX
description: This datapack adds driveable 3D spaceship modeled in blender, inspired from F-Zero GX
body:
# MC-26 GX: No resource pack required

This datapack adds driveable race spaceships!

![One of the spaceship rendered in sketchfab, exactly the same as in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nhQ1Ovkf/images/87210202c89b35ae8207316866feaf8cc8301525.png)
_One of the spaceship rendered in sketchfab, exactly the same as in-game_

Those spaceships can fly but can't go up or down by default, you will need to place specific blocks designed for this under the spaceship to make the spaceship go up or down (like yellow concrete & another concrete color, see the last section of this page).

Only the exploration spaceship that can be used to fly everywhere.


## How to place a spaceship

To place a spaceship, run /function gx:spaceships/spaceship or /function gx:spaceships/darkschneider.



## How to use the race editor

### With 3D elements
![race](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/project/2025/481/19391943_l.webp)

Run anything from /function gx:racetrack/ to spawn elements from the race editor!

You are able to spawn futuristic pillar, sphere, rotating elements and the base racetrack!
The hitbox isnt included so you'll have to place barrier to set hitbox

### With vanilla blocks
**GO UP OR DOWN**

Some blocks create specific actions!

- Yellow concrete makes your spaceship go up from 1.5 block **over the world surface**
  - Lime concrete allows you to go up in the -Z direction, (place it after a yellow concrete block, also useful as a booster)
  - Blue concrete allows you to go up in the Z direction, (place it after a yellow concrete block, also useful as a booster)
  - Magenta concrete allows you to go up in the -X direction, (place it after a yellow concrete block, also useful as a booster)
  - Brown concrete allows you to go up in the X direction, (place it after a yellow concrete block, also useful as a booster)
  - White concrete allows your spaceship to jump. Place black concrete at the place the spaceship is about to land, followed by a concrete of the color of the direction you are going in

Examples:

- How to make a jump area
![How to make a jump area](https://i.imgur.com/975Fhqc.jpeg)
- How to go up
![How to go up](https://i.imgur.com/X5v02Vm.jpeg)
![How to go up](https://i.imgur.com/GdRkDKS.jpeg)
- Race design
![Race design in a futuristic city with neons, flying train](https://i.imgur.com/GK0X20E.jpeg)
